intro.title: Activities You Enjoy
intro.subtitle: Rediscovering Joyful Moments
intro.p1: When you're feeling low, anxious, or overwhelmed, it can be hard to remember what brings you joy.
intro.p2: This activity is not about doing more. It is about noticing small moments that feel light, calm, or meaningful.
intro.p3: There is no pressure to feel happy. We are simply exploring what feels even slightly good.

recall.title: Think About a Moment
recall.p1: Take a moment to remember a time — recent or distant — when you felt even a small sense of enjoyment, peace, or comfort. It does not have to be big.
recall.input1_label: One activity I enjoy (or used to enjoy) is...
recall.input2_label: When I do this, I usually feel...

meaning.title: What Makes It Meaningful?
meaning.p1: Sometimes the activity itself is not the only source of joy. It may be the feeling, the environment, or the connection around it.
meaning.input1_placeholder: e.g. it gives me a sense of freedom
meaning.input2_label: This activity helps me feel more...

smallStep.title: A Small Step Forward
smallStep.p1: You do not need to change everything at once.
smallStep.p2: Would it feel possible to reconnect with this activity in a small way?
smallStep.input1_label: One small step I could take this week is...

affirmation.title: You Took a Beautiful Step
affirmation.p1: Reconnecting with what brings you joy — even in the smallest way — is an act of kindness toward yourself.
affirmation.p2: You deserve moments of lightness and peace. Keep nurturing what makes your heart feel full. 💛

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

app_complete_message: You've successfully recalled and connected with a source of joy. Keep this feeling with you as you move through your day.
